description: Spine GraphRAG Gold Standard Questions v2 - 40 questions across 8 domains

schema.id: Domain prefix + number (DG=Degenerative, CV=Cervical, MIS=Minimally Invasive, DF=Deformity, TR=Trauma/Infection, TU=Tumor, BS=Basic Science, DI=Diagnosis/Innovation)
schema.question: Clinical question in English
schema.domain: degenerative | cervical | minimally_invasive | deformity | trauma_infection | tumor | basic_science | diagnosis_innovation

questions.question: What is the comparative evidence for TLIF versus PLIF versus OLIF versus ALIF for lumbar degenerative spondylolisthesis in terms of fusion rate, sagittal alignment restoration, and complication profiles?
questions.question_kr: 요추 퇴행성 척추전방전위증에서 TLIF vs PLIF vs OLIF vs ALIF의 유합률, 시상면 정렬 회복, 합병증 프로파일 비교 근거는?

questions.question: What is the evidence for decompression alone versus decompression with fusion for degenerative lumbar spondylolisthesis, and what are the indications for adding fusion?
questions.question_kr: 퇴행성 요추 척추전방전위증에서 감압술 단독 vs 감압+유합술의 근거와 유합술 추가 적응증은?

questions.question: What is the current evidence for epidural steroid injection effectiveness in lumbar spinal stenosis, including the impact of repeated injections and optimal timing for surgical referral?
questions.question_kr: 요추 척추관 협착증에서 경막외 스테로이드 주사의 효과, 반복 주사의 영향, 수술 의뢰 최적 시점에 대한 현재 근거는?

questions.question: What are the risk factors for cage subsidence after lumbar interbody fusion, and how do cage design, material, and endplate preparation affect subsidence rates and clinical outcomes?
questions.question_kr: 요추 추체간 유합술 후 케이지 침하의 위험인자와 케이지 디자인, 재료, 종판 준비가 침하율 및 임상 결과에 미치는 영향은?

questions.question: What is the evidence for BMP-2 use in lumbar interbody fusion regarding fusion rates, dose-dependent complications, heterotopic ossification, and cancer risk?
questions.question_kr: 요추 추체간 유합술에서 BMP-2 사용의 유합률, 용량 의존적 합병증, 이소성 골화, 암 위험에 대한 근거는?

questions.question: What is the evidence comparing cervical disc replacement (CDR) versus anterior cervical discectomy and fusion (ACDF) for 1-2 level cervical disc disease in terms of adjacent segment degeneration, reoperation rates, and range of motion preservation?
questions.question_kr: 1-2분절 경추 추간판 질환에서 CDR vs ACDF의 인접분절 퇴행, 재수술률, 운동범위 보존 비교 근거는?

questions.question: What is the best surgical approach (anterior, posterior, or combined) for multilevel cervical spondylotic myelopathy, and what factors guide the choice of approach?
questions.question_kr: 다분절 경추 척추증성 척수증에 대한 최적 수술 접근법(전방, 후방, 복합)과 접근법 선택을 결정하는 요인은?

questions.question: What are the comparative outcomes of laminoplasty versus laminectomy with fusion for multilevel cervical myelopathy, including C5 palsy rates, range of motion, and considerations for OPLL?
questions.question_kr: 다분절 경추 척수증에서 후궁성형술 vs 후궁절제+유합술의 비교 결과(C5 마비율, 운동범위, OPLL 고려사항 포함)는?

questions.question: What is the evidence for surgical management of subaxial cervical spine injuries comparing anterior versus posterior approaches in terms of neurological recovery and stability?
questions.question_kr: 하부 경추 손상의 수술적 관리에서 전방 vs 후방 접근법의 신경학적 회복 및 안정성 비교 근거는?

questions.question: What is the incidence, risk factors, and prevention strategies for adjacent segment disease after cervical spine fusion?
questions.question_kr: 경추 유합술 후 인접분절 질환의 발생률, 위험인자, 예방 전략은?

questions.question: What is the evidence comparing UBE (biportal endoscopic) versus conventional decompression for lumbar spinal stenosis in terms of clinical outcomes, complications, and learning curve?
questions.question_kr: 요추 척추관 협착증에서 UBE(이중포탈 내시경) vs 기존 감압술의 임상 결과, 합병증, 학습 곡선 비교 근거는?

questions.question: What is the comparative evidence for full-endoscopic lumbar discectomy (FELD/PELD) versus microdiscectomy for lumbar disc herniation regarding recurrence rates, recovery time, and patient selection?
questions.question_kr: 요추 추간판 탈출증에서 전내시경 추간판절제술(FELD/PELD) vs 미세현미경 추간판절제술의 재발률, 회복 시간, 환자 선택 비교 근거는?

questions.question: What are the comparative outcomes of MIS-TLIF versus open TLIF for lumbar degenerative disease in terms of perioperative morbidity, fusion rates, and long-term clinical results?
questions.question_kr: 요추 퇴행성 질환에서 MIS-TLIF vs 개방형 TLIF의 주수술기 이환율, 유합률, 장기 임상 결과 비교는?

questions.question: What are the indications, outcomes, and complications of lateral lumbar interbody fusion (OLIF/LLIF) including psoas injury rates and subsidence?
questions.question_kr: 측방 요추 추체간 유합술(OLIF/LLIF)의 적응증, 결과, 합병증(요근 손상률 및 침하 포함)은?

questions.question: What is the evidence for the learning curve in minimally invasive spine surgery, including the number of cases needed for proficiency and how complication rates change with experience?
questions.question_kr: 최소침습 척추 수술의 학습 곡선에 대한 근거(숙련도 도달에 필요한 증례 수, 경험에 따른 합병증률 변화 포함)는?

questions.question: What is the incidence and risk factors for proximal junctional kyphosis (PJK) and proximal junctional failure (PJF) after adult spinal deformity surgery, and what preventive strategies exist?
questions.question_kr: 성인 척추 변형 수술 후 근위부 접합부 후만증(PJK) 및 근위부 접합부 실패(PJF)의 발생률, 위험인자, 예방 전략은?

questions.question: What are the comparative outcomes of pedicle subtraction osteotomy (PSO) versus vertebral column resection (VCR) for fixed sagittal imbalance in terms of correction magnitude, complication rates, and reoperation?
questions.question_kr: 고정된 시상면 불균형에서 척추경 감산 절골술(PSO) vs 척추주 절제술(VCR)의 교정량, 합병증률, 재수술 비교 결과는?

questions.question: What are the current sagittal alignment targets (PI-LL, GAP score, age-adjusted alignment) and how do they correlate with patient-reported outcomes?
questions.question_kr: 현재 시상면 정렬 목표(PI-LL, GAP 점수, 연령 보정 정렬)와 환자 보고 결과와의 상관관계는?

questions.question: What is the evidence for surgical versus conservative treatment of adolescent idiopathic scoliosis, and what are the current indications for surgery?
questions.question_kr: 청소년 특발성 측만증에서 수술 vs 보존적 치료의 근거와 현재 수술 적응증은?

questions.question: What is the role of anterior column reconstruction (ACR/ALIF) in adult spinal deformity correction, including its effect on sagittal alignment, rod fracture prevention, and long-term durability?
questions.question_kr: 성인 척추 변형 교정에서 전방주 재건(ACR/ALIF)의 역할(시상면 정렬, 로드 골절 예방, 장기 내구성에 대한 효과 포함)은?

questions.question: What is the evidence comparing short-segment versus long-segment posterior fixation for thoracolumbar burst fractures in terms of kyphosis correction, failure rates, and functional outcomes?
questions.question_kr: 흉요추부 방출 골절에서 단분절 vs 장분절 후방 고정의 후만 교정, 실패율, 기능적 결과 비교 근거는?

questions.question: What is the evidence comparing vertebroplasty and kyphoplasty versus conservative management for osteoporotic vertebral compression fractures in terms of pain relief, kyphosis progression, and adjacent fracture risk?
questions.question_kr: 골다공증성 척추 압박골절에서 척추성형술/풍선후만성형술 vs 보존적 치료의 통증 완화, 후만 진행, 인접 골절 위험 비교 근거는?

questions.question: What is the current evidence for the timing of surgical decompression in acute spinal cord injury, and what is the role of methylprednisolone?
questions.question_kr: 급성 척수 손상에서 수술적 감압의 시점에 대한 현재 근거와 메틸프레드니솔론의 역할은?

questions.question: What is the evidence for surgical versus antibiotic-only treatment of pyogenic spondylodiscitis, including indications for surgery and organism-specific treatment strategies?
questions.question_kr: 화농성 척추 추간판염에서 수술 vs 항생제 단독 치료의 근거(수술 적응증 및 원인균별 치료 전략 포함)는?

questions.question: What are the risk factors, prevention strategies (vancomycin powder, betadine irrigation), and treatment approaches for surgical site infection after spine surgery?
questions.question_kr: 척추 수술 후 수술 부위 감염의 위험인자, 예방 전략(반코마이신 분말, 베타딘 세척), 치료 접근법은?

questions.question: What is the evidence for using the Spinal Instability Neoplastic Score (SINS) to guide surgical decision-making in metastatic spine disease within the NOMS framework?
questions.question_kr: NOMS 프레임워크 내에서 전이성 척추 질환의 수술적 의사결정을 위한 SINS(척추 불안정성 종양 점수) 활용 근거는?

questions.question: What are the outcomes of separation surgery followed by stereotactic body radiation therapy (SBRT) for metastatic spine tumors in terms of local control and survival?
questions.question_kr: 전이성 척추 종양에서 분리 수술 후 정위체부방사선치료(SBRT)의 국소 제어율 및 생존율 결과는?

questions.question: What are the outcomes and prognostic factors for en bloc spondylectomy in primary spinal tumors regarding surgical margins, recurrence, and functional outcomes?
questions.question_kr: 원발성 척추 종양에서 전절제술(en bloc spondylectomy)의 수술 변연, 재발, 기능적 결과 및 예후 인자는?

questions.question: What is the evidence for minimally invasive approaches (percutaneous fixation, cement augmentation) in metastatic spine disease regarding indications, outcomes, and complications?
questions.question_kr: 전이성 척추 질환에서 최소침습 접근법(경피적 고정, 시멘트 보강)의 적응증, 결과, 합병증에 대한 근거는?

questions.question: What are the surgical outcomes and prognostic factors for intramedullary spinal cord tumors (ependymoma vs astrocytoma) comparing gross total versus subtotal resection?
questions.question_kr: 척수내 종양(상의세포종 vs 성상세포종)에서 전절제 vs 아전절제의 수술 결과 및 예후 인자는?

questions.question: What is the current evidence for stem cell therapy in intervertebral disc degeneration, including preclinical results, clinical trial outcomes, and barriers to translation?
questions.question_kr: 추간판 퇴행에서 줄기세포 치료의 현재 근거(전임상 결과, 임상시험 결과, 중개 연구 장벽 포함)는?

questions.question: What is the comparative evidence for autograft versus allograft versus synthetic bone graft substitutes in spinal fusion regarding fusion rates, biology, and clinical outcomes?
questions.question_kr: 척추 유합에서 자가골 vs 동종골 vs 합성 골이식 대체물의 유합률, 생물학, 임상 결과 비교 근거는?

questions.question: What are the current understanding of intervertebral disc degeneration mechanisms, including molecular pathways, biomarkers, and correlation with imaging findings?
questions.question_kr: 추간판 퇴행 기전에 대한 현재 이해(분자 경로, 바이오마커, 영상 소견과의 상관관계 포함)는?

questions.question: What is the current evidence for spinal cord regeneration strategies including scaffolds, neurotrophic factors, and neuroprotective agents in preclinical and clinical studies?
questions.question_kr: 전임상 및 임상 연구에서 척수 재생 전략(스캐폴드, 신경영양인자, 신경보호제 포함)에 대한 현재 근거는?

questions.question: What is the evidence for how cage material, design, and size affect biomechanical performance, subsidence risk, and fusion outcomes in lumbar interbody fusion?
questions.question_kr: 요추 추체간 유합에서 케이지 재료, 디자인, 크기가 생역학적 성능, 침하 위험, 유합 결과에 미치는 영향에 대한 근거는?

questions.question: What is the evidence comparing robot-assisted versus freehand and navigated pedicle screw placement in terms of accuracy, clinical outcomes, radiation exposure, and cost-effectiveness?
questions.question_kr: 로봇 보조 vs 프리핸드 및 네비게이션 척추경 나사못 삽입의 정확도, 임상 결과, 방사선 노출, 비용효과성 비교 근거는?

questions.question: What is the evidence for intraoperative navigation systems (O-arm, CT navigation) in spine surgery regarding accuracy, radiation exposure, and clinical outcomes compared to fluoroscopy?
questions.question_kr: 척추 수술에서 수술 중 네비게이션 시스템(O-arm, CT 네비게이션)의 정확도, 방사선 노출, 임상 결과(투시 대비) 근거는?

questions.question: What is the current evidence for artificial intelligence applications in spine imaging, including automated Cobb angle measurement, stenosis grading, and fracture detection?
questions.question_kr: 척추 영상에서 인공지능 응용의 현재 근거(자동 Cobb 각도 측정, 협착 등급화, 골절 탐지 포함)는?

questions.question: What is the evidence for augmented reality (AR) and virtual reality (VR) applications in spine surgery for surgical planning, intraoperative guidance, and surgical training?
questions.question_kr: 척추 수술에서 증강현실(AR) 및 가상현실(VR) 응용의 수술 계획, 수술 중 가이드, 수술 교육에 대한 근거는?

questions.question: What is the evidence for machine learning-based predictive models in spine surgery for predicting complications, patient-reported outcomes, and hospital readmission?
questions.question_kr: 척추 수술에서 머신러닝 기반 예측 모델의 합병증 예측, 환자 보고 결과 예측, 재입원 예측에 대한 근거는?
